mapper.select: select b.id, b.title, b.pic, b.content, b.createtime, b.admin_id, u.username as admin_username, u.department as admin_department from blog b left join user u on b.admin_id = u.id

select b.id, b.title, b.pic, b.content, b.createtime, b.admin_id, u.username as admin_username, u.department as admin_department from blog b left join user u on b.admin_id = u.id where b.id = #{blogId}

select b.id, b.title, b.pic, b.content, b.createtime, b.admin_id, u.username as admin_username, u.department as admin_department from blog b left join user u on b.admin_id = u.id order by b.createtime desc limit #{n}

select b.id, b.title, b.pic, b.content, b.createtime, b.admin_id, u.username as admin_username, u.department as admin_department from blog b left join user u on b.admin_id = u.id order by b.createtime desc limit #{start}, #{limit}
